meta.note: Manual fincode → screener.in symbol overrides for the shares-outstanding feed. Add an entry here when scripts/ingest/shares-outstanding.ts resolves a company to the wrong screener page (the autocomplete top-hit was ambiguous). The symbol is the slug in the company URL, e.g. https://www.screener.in/company/HDFCBANK/ → "HDFCBANK". An override forces that page and skips the search step.
